description: Multi-messenger astronomy - FRBs, kilonovae, GW counterparts, neutrino sources.

facts.context: Fast radio bursts have been conclusively linked to:
distractors: artificial signals from extraterrestrial intelligent civilizations as primary source
black hole evaporation producing observable radio frequency electromagnetic bursts
ordinary radio pulsars with no unusual physical properties required for explanation

facts.truth: at least some sources are non-cataclysmic
distractors: all fast radio bursts must originate from single catastrophic explosive events
repetition is impossible and claimed repeaters are instrumental artifacts only
every FRB source produces exactly one burst and then becomes permanently silent

facts.truth: diverse environments from dwarf to massive galaxies
distractors: all FRBs originate exclusively from one specific type of host galaxy environment
no FRB has ever been successfully localized to any host galaxy whatsoever
FRBs only occur in intergalactic space far from any galaxies at all

facts.truth: r-process nucleosynthesis in neutron star mergers
distractors: that neutron star mergers produce absolutely no electromagnetic radiation signals
heavy elements cannot possibly form in any neutron star merger environment
gravitational wave events can never have associated electromagnetic counterparts

facts.context: Kilonova observations suggest neutron star mergers produce:
facts.truth: significant fraction of cosmic heavy elements
distractors: only light elements like hydrogen and helium with no heavy element production
negligible amounts of heavy elements compared to supernova nucleosynthesis
elements that immediately decay and contribute nothing to cosmic abundances
no coordination because gravitational waves provide exact source positions already
waiting years after detection before any electromagnetic observations are useful
only space-based telescopes because ground observatories cannot participate

facts.truth: a blazar coincident with high-energy neutrino events
distractors: no clear sources despite extensive observation campaigns
only atmospheric neutrinos without astrophysical component
random directions with no point source associations

facts.truth: not yet detected but actively searched
distractors: have been definitively detected from multiple binary neutron star mergers
are theoretically impossible to produce in any gravitational wave source
cannot be distinguished from atmospheric neutrino background ever

facts.truth: short GRBs and neutron star mergers
distractors: short gamma-ray bursts and supermassive black hole activity in distant galaxies
long gamma-ray bursts and binary neutron star merger gravitational waves
gamma-ray bursts and stellar flares from nearby ordinary main sequence stars

facts.truth: still uncertain despite decades of study
distractors: definitively identified as coming from specific known active galactic nuclei
proven to originate from within our own Milky Way galaxy exclusively
completely understood with no remaining mysteries about their origin

facts.truth: small dipole suggesting extragalactic origin at highest energies
distractors: perfect isotropy proving cosmic rays have no preferred arrival directions
strong anisotropy pointing directly at the galactic center as the source
patterns that prove cosmic rays are produced inside our solar system
temporary oscillation that completely returns to original configuration after wave
purely theoretical prediction that has been ruled out by LIGO observations
only present in alternative gravity theories and not in general relativity
